data.name: SECRET WORK AFTER HOURS
data.detailed_description:
Hentai visual novel in which sexual content is unlocked by completing minigames and asking the girls how many times you have won each one. The main gameplay mechanic consists of clearing the minigames and reaching a specific number of victories to unlock two possible endings for each girl. In total, the game features 4 different girls and 4 distinct minigames: apple catching, fast clicking, ping-pong, and a memory game.

The story begins when a man dies after being run over while saving a dog and is reincarnated in another world. Unlike his previous life, he must work in a village inhabited by semi-human girls. His efforts will not go unrewarded: as he helps them with various tasks, he gradually earns their trust and affection, leading to intimate relationships.

Content Warning:
This game contains explicit sex, sexual acts, and inappropriate language. All depicted characters are adults, and none of the characters or scenes are real; they are parodic interpretations created for humorous, artistic, and entertainment purposes. The game does not seek to glorify or promote the behaviors depicted.

data.short_description: Hentai visual novel where content is unlocked by winning minigames. There are 4 girls, 4 challenges, and two endings for each one. A man reincarnates in a world of semi-human girls, works in the village, and develops relationships. 18+ content.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
